generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw a local mom share how new security measures at our schools made her feel safer. 'Finally, our kids can focus on learning without worrying about threats,' she said. With all the uncertainty out there, shouldn't we support giving authorities the tools they need to keep us safe? #CommunityFirst #SecurityMatters
